mapper.select: select id, server_resources_id, fail_reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from failed_domain_blocking_log where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into failed_domain_blocking_log(id, server_resources_id, fail_reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{serverResourcesId}, #{failReason}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into failed_domain_blocking_log(id,server_resources_id, fail_reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.serverResourcesId}, #{entity.failReason}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into failed_domain_blocking_log(id,server_resources_id, fail_reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.serverResourcesId}, #{entity.failReason}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update server_resources_id = values(server_resources_id), fail_reason = values(fail_reason), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
